economic_notes: Consolidated entity includes Migizy Odenaw Inc. Modified equity method used for Kebaowek Land Management Inc. (dissolved during year), Amik Nikewin Development Inc., and Kitika Nijwaswi L.P. (and its subsidiaries Mikan Transport L.P. and Mitikon L.P.). New 20% investment in Energie renouvelable Onimiki S.E.C. Qualified audit opinion due to non-consolidation of controlled entities and failure to identify asset retirement obligations under PS 3280.
notes: Qualified audit opinion on two bases: (1) three controlled entities (Kebaowek Land Management Inc. - dissolved, Amik Nikewin Development Inc., Kitika Nijwaswi L.P.) are accounted for by modified equity method instead of full consolidation as required by PSAS; (2) asset retirement obligations under PS 3280 not identified or measured. Large swing in revenue year-over-year ($49.3M vs $21.8M in 2023) driven primarily by deferred revenue and ISC unexpended funding timing differences. Net investment in capital assets grew significantly from $32.2M to $57.1M due to $25M in capital asset acquisitions including large assets under construction ($19.7M). Legally enforceable right to set-off of $1,110,144 between SRPNI loan and receivable recorded as non-cash transaction. isc_funding calculated as sum of ISC Flexible ($3,229,823) + ISC Grant ($6,224,108) + ISC Fixed ($4,698,229) + ISC Set ($566,162) + ISC Block ($28,329) = $14,746,651. total_government_transfers includes ISC funding plus CMHC ($805,349), Federal contribution other ($941,607), FNEC ($58,598), FNQLHSSC ($261,374), Government of Quebec ($5,314,957), FNHRDCQ ($419,573), Provincial and federal police ($6,547,026), SRPNI ($2,421,554), Ministere des Forets ($270,000) = $31,785,689 before netting deferred items; osr calculated as total revenue minus government transfers using gross figures from income statement.
